creator: thorstedsl@utahlinx.com
text:
Set bios to boot from CDROM.
Install begins and I'm able to go through the screens.  The program gets to the screen that says:
"Extracting Bin into / directory"  Then I get this message:
"Write failure on transfer (wrote -1 bytes of 240640 bytes)"  I retry and it tries to load up to the same point and then gives the same error message.
